brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome. Confident not pushy. Geist typeface. Weight scale: 400/500/600.

It helps teams improve execution speed, reduce operational friction, and align cross-functional work through clearer workflows and automation. features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure content is cited and linked by AI engines
pain_points: Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps
Lack of actionable insights to improve AI search rankings
messaging_angles: Unlock the full potential of AI search optimization
Take control of your brand's visibility across multiple AI engines
product_knowledge.target_customer: e-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, agencies

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: SaaS engagement benchmarks for the selected format.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps and lack of actionable insights to improve AI search rankings
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable is a SaaS product that helps teams improve execution speed, reduce operational friction, and align cross-functional work through clearer workflows and automation
strategy_brief.differentiator: Unlock the full potential of AI search optimization without sacrificing control over brand visibility
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Discover how Searchable can optimize your AI search rankings and boost your brand's online presence
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Unlock the full potential of AI search optimization

linkedin_content.hook: Boost Your Brand's Online Presence with Searchable
linkedin_content.body: Searchable is a SaaS product proven to reduce operational friction, improve execution speed, and align cross-functional work through clearer workflows and automation. Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps and lack of actionable insights takes a toll on your team's productivity. A competitive website without optimized AI search rankings can lead to missed opportunities, lost sales, and damaged reputation. Achieve the 206% share of voice improvements that Searchable has helped its clients achieve. With searchable, automate repetitive tasks and align teams around clearer workflows.
linkedin_content.full_post:
Boost Your Brand's Online Presence with Searchable

Searchable is a SaaS product proven to reduce operational friction, improve execution speed, and align cross-functional work through clearer workflows and automation. Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps and lack of actionable insights takes a toll on your team's productivity. A competitive website without optimized AI search rankings can lead to missed opportunities, lost sales, and damaged reputation. Achieve the 206% share of voice improvements that Searchable has helped its clients achieve. With searchable, automate repetitive tasks and align teams around clearer workflows.

#ArtificialIntelligence #SearchEngineOptimization #DigitalMarketing

evaluation.scores_rationale: The core message gets through, but there is a minor section that slows reading. The hook stops the scroll or forces continued reading. On-voice for 90% of the copy — one sentence breaks register. Every claim is directly traceable to the primary_claim.
